forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, password reset instructions will be sent.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to access admin dashboard.
auth.apiUnavailable: Unable to connect to API. Check that backend is running.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your admin account.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.incompleteDescription: This password reset link is incomplete.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link cannot be used.
resetPassword.tokenInvalid: This password reset link is invalid. Request a new reset link and try again.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: This password reset link has expired. Request a new reset link and try again.
resetPassword.tokenUsed: This password reset link has already been used. Request a new reset link and try again.
resetPassword.tokenUserInactive: This password reset link is no longer active. Contact an administrator or request a new reset link.
resetPassword.tokenInvalidOrExpired: Password reset token is invalid or expired.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
validation.passwordConfirmationMin: Password confirmation must be at least {{count}} characters.
validation.tokenRequired: Password reset token is missing. Request a new reset link and try again.
